equivalence_argument: The current registry is bounded by max size but has no executor TTL field or one-hour TTL initialization.

negative_search_evidence.missing_behavior: The verifier-created registry does not initialize or preserve executor_ttl=3600 seconds.
related_but_insufficient_code: crates/ethereum/node/src/node.rs initializes the RPC verifier registry with ExecutorRegistry::new(100).
crates/ritual-spc-verification/src/types.rs ExecutorRegistry stores max_executors only, and ExecutorRegistryConfig exposes contract_address and max_executors without TTL.

notes: Confirmed gap for the TTL part of the invariant.
rationale: The registry is constructed directly with those literal parameters in the primary diff. No candidate in this bounded assignment contradicts or removes it.
statement: The node-builder-created SPC verifier must use an ExecutorRegistry initialized with max_executors=100 and executor_ttl=3600 seconds.
suggested_falsification_tests: Inspect the verifier registry created by components() and assert its configured max size is 100 and executor TTL is one hour.
summary: The verifier registry is size-bounded but has no TTL configuration.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Inspect the node-created verifier registry config and assert max_executors=100 plus executor_ttl=3600; current registry has no TTL field.
title: SPC verifier registry starts bounded
